interviews.title: Rossano Sportiello interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Hartford, New York, October 2, 2015 [interview 1 of 2]

concerts.label: Carnegie Hall Notables: The Ninth Annual Notable Occasion: Rossano Sportiello and His American Jazz Stars

about_quotes.speaker: Sudhalter
about_quotes.evidence: And Rossano I met actually in Ascona, Switzerland where he was playing.

about_quotes.speaker: Eddie Metz Jr.
about_quotes.evidence: This trio has kind of evolved into the Rossano Sportiello Trio... it’s kind of Rossano’s band. It started as my idea, presenting it to Arbors — oh I’d love to record with Nicki and Rossano.
about_quotes.doc_title: Eddie Metz Jr. interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Hartford, New York, October 3, 2015

about_quotes.speaker: Rick Margitza
about_quotes.evidence: The interviewee discusses Rossano Sportiello only in response to the interviewer's question quoting him; the interviewee does not mention any personal interaction, collaboration, or direct knowledge of Sportiello.
about_quotes.doc_title: Rick Margitza interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, November 22, 2024

about_quotes.speaker: Adrian Cunningham
about_quotes.evidence: Rossano Sportiello said something once to me that really made an impression on me when he was in his late teens learning to play... and I wonder if in Australia is that a goal...
about_quotes.doc_title: Adrian Cunningham interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, March 31, 2021

about_quotes.speaker: Nicki Parrott
about_quotes.evidence: So sometimes I might hire Rossano Sportiello over John DiMartino... I kind of have a pool of musicians I try to get
about_quotes.doc_title: Nicki Parrott interviewed by Monk Rowe. Utica, New York, November 6, 2010 [interview 1 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Ada Rovatti
about_quotes.evidence: Yes. Actually we are coming from almost the same area. We grew up ten minutes apart.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ada Rovatti interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, December 13, 2022
